text: Packer (HashiCorp, 2013) creates identical machine images for multiple platforms from a single configuration. Define once, build for AWS AMI, Azure VM, GCP image, Docker, VirtualBox. Immutable infrastructure: bake software into image, deploy by launching new instances.
